div.div:
Chat Widget
(vanilla TS, Shadow DOM,
localStorage for sessionId)

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 230px; margin-left: 447px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #3F6B22;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3F6B22, #84aa6b); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 495px; margin-left: 139px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.span:
• node:http server on PORT: routes, CORS, static serving of / and /widget.js
• Chat orchestration loop: anthropic.messages.create tool-use loop, max 8 iterations/turn
• MCP client: spawns and talks to the subprocess over stdio
• Session store: in-memory Map<sessionId, Message[]>, cleared on restart

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 695px; margin-left: 139px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.span:
• Exposes tools: search_games, get_game, get_order (requires order_id + email)
• Order-lookup gate is enforced in tool code, not in the prompt, so the LLM cannot bypass it
• Data: games[] and orders[] arrays, loaded once from games.json / orders.json via readFileSync at startup

switch.text: MCP Server subprocess (Node child of the backend, server/src/index.ts, @modelc...

from the MCP subprocess and resent every call.

div.div:
System prompt + tool-use loop
- Czech-only persona ("GameShop")
- Max 8 iterations of tool-use per turn
- Full message history sent each turn

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1055px; margin-left: 417px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Session + history handling
- sessionId from widget (localStorage UUID)
- History kept server-side in the Map
- Widget also mirrors messages in localStorage (UX only, not auth)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1055px; margin-left: 697px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Order-lookup guardrail
get_order needs BOTH:
- order_id
- email
Enforced in tool code inside the MCP subprocess, not in the prompt.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1055px; margin-left: 977px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Ambiguous error on mismatch
On a bad order_id + email pair the tool returns "not_found_or_unauthorized". The assistant is instructed NOT to reveal which field was wrong.
